metadata.title: BimDossier
metadata.defaultTitle: BimDossier · snagging and quality control, built on your model
metadata.description: Pin snags on your 3D model or a PDF floor plan, follow them through to fixed with photos as proof, and export a clean report. Built in the Netherlands, with a full Wkb dossier when you need one.

hero.badge: Private pilot · a few open spots for Dutch contractors
hero.headline: The construction quality platform, built on your model. From first snag to final dossier.
hero.subtitle: Pin every snag on your 3D model, or on a PDF floor plan if you don't have a model yet. Add photos, assign the fix, and follow it through to done. Deadlines track themselves, so your Wkb dossier stays ready from bouwmelding to gereedmelding.
hero.trust: In private pilot with Dutch contractors · EU-hosted, DPA included · Works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and instrument

features.headline: Everything you need to run quality on your model
features.subtitle: Snagging, inspections, photos, certificates and reports all sit on the same model. When you need it, the full Wkb dossier is there too, from bouwmelding to gereedmelding.

useCases.headline: Same tool, different jobs
useCases.subtitle: Whatever you came for, it runs on the same model.

snagging.title: Snagging
snagging.body: Pin a snag on the model, send it to whoever fixes it, and check it off with a photo.

inspections.title: Inspections
inspections.body: Walk the site, log what you find, and turn the round into a PDF report.

handover.title: Handover
handover.body: Hand the client a full record of the work, with every snag and photo in place.

wkb.title: Wkb dossier
wkb.body: The whole Wkb dossier, from bouwmelding to gereedmelding, kept up to date for you.

featureDetail.imagesNote: More screenshots and short videos coming soon.

roadmap.headline: What we're building next
roadmap.subtitle: Already in design or in progress. Not available yet.

comments.title: Finding discussions
comments.body: Comment threads on each finding so your team and kwaliteitsborger can resolve issues in context.

handover.title: Consumentendossier & oplevering
handover.body: Client handover sign-off and proces-verbaal, separate from the dossier bevoegd gezag.

ai.title: AI dossier assistant
ai.body: Ask questions across your documents and drawings. Self-hosted and privacy-first, so your data never leaves our EU infrastructure.

push.title: Mobile push reminders
push.body: Deadline and finding alerts pushed straight to your phone.

howItWorks.headline: From project start to gereedmelding in four steps

step1.title: Create your project
step1.body: Enter the address with Dutch autocomplete, pick the building type and gevolgklasse, and set your planned dates. We compute the deadlines automatically.

step2.title: Upload documents
step2.body: Drawings, certificates, KB documents: upload everything in one place. The dossier checklist shows what's still missing.

step3.title: Track findings
step3.body: Log inspection findings, assign them to your team, and upload evidence photos. Each one runs its full lifecycle, from open to verified.

step4.title: File on time
step4.body: Email reminders land before every deadline. When it's time, download the complete dossier package and file your gereedmelding at the Omgevingsloket.

cta.headline: Stop chasing paperwork. Prove the work was done right.
cta.subtitle: Snagging, inspections and your Wkb dossier, all on your model. Join the private pilot and walk into your next gereedmelding already done.

blog.headline: Insights & updates
blog.subtitle: Wkb compliance, Dutch building regulations, and product updates, straight from the team building the dossier that runs on your model.
blog.empty: No posts yet. Check back soon.

contactPage.headline: Let's find the right plan for your team
contactPage.subtitle: We'll walk you through BimDossier, answer your questions, and help you choose the plan that fits your projects.
contactPage.bookCallDescription: Schedule a 30-minute demo with our team. We'll show you the platform and talk through pricing that fits your situation.
contactPage.emailDescription: Prefer email? Reach out and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
contactPage.noBookingUrl: Booking link coming soon. For now, just reach out by email.

metadata.title: BimDossier · Contact sales
metadata.description: Book a demo or get in touch with the BimDossier team to discuss pricing and plans.

intro.subtitle: We're opening a limited pilot to a small group of Dutch contractors. Tell us about your team, and if it's a fit we'll be in touch.

errors.pendingDuplicate: We've already got your request. Give us a day to look it over and we'll email you.
errors.alreadyApproved: Your BimDossier account is already set up. Check your email for the activation link, or contact support if you didn't receive one.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests from your network. Please try again in an hour.

metadata.title: BimDossier · Request access
metadata.description: Request a guided demo of BimDossier, the BIM platform built for the Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen (Wkb).

snagShowcase.headline: Catch defects before they cost you.
snagShowcase.subtitle: Drag to rotate the model. Snags are flagged right on it as inspectors find and fix them.
snagShowcase.hintWatch: Each pin flags a real snag
snagShowcase.learnMoreBlog: See how snagging works on the blog
snagShowcase.fallbackBody: Your browser can't show the live 3D model, but here are the snags it carries:
snagShowcase.fallbackAlt: Interactive 3D building model with quality-assurance snags

trust.headline: Built for a regulated pilot, and honest about it
trust.subtitle: Your dossier is legally load-bearing. So here's exactly who builds the platform, where your data lives, and where our responsibility ends.

hosting.title: EU-hosted, DPA included
hosting.body: Your data runs on EU infrastructure and never leaves it. We sign a verwerkersovereenkomst (DPA) with every pilot partner.

instrument.title: Works alongside your kwaliteitsborger
instrument.body: BimDossier is not an approved Wkb instrument and doesn't replace one. It runs your dossier and works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and instrument you already use.

team.title: A Dutch team, reachable
team.body: Built in the Netherlands by the team behind BimDossier. During the pilot you reach us directly. No ticket queue.

items.q: What does "private pilot" mean for me?
items.a: We onboard a small group of Dutch aannemers by hand. You get early access, a direct line to the team, and a say in what we build next. In exchange, we ask for honest real-world feedback.

items.q: Where does my data live, and is there a DPA?
items.a: Everything runs on EU infrastructure and never leaves it. We sign a verwerkersovereenkomst (DPA) with every pilot partner. Read our DPA for the details.

items.q: Do I need BIM models, or do PDF floor plans work too?
items.a: Both. Pin findings straight onto a PDF plattegrond when that's all you have, or onto a federated IFC model when you've got one. Either way, the dossier works the same.

items.q: Does this replace my kwaliteitsborger or instrument?
items.a: No. BimDossier is not an approved Wkb instrument. It runs your dossier and works alongside any kwaliteitsborger and any instrument you already use.

items.q: Will it fit the tools I already work with?
items.a: Findings import and export over BCF, so issues round-trip with your kwaliteitsborger's tools instead of living in a silo.
Pilot pricing depends on your team and projects. Request access and we'll talk it through. Starting the conversation commits you to nothing.

brandPanel.eyebrow: Construction quality, built on your model
brandPanel.headline: Keep every snag, photo and certificate on the model.
brandPanel.body: Pin findings on your model, track every deadline, and keep the dossier ready for the kwaliteitsborger and bevoegd gezag. Built for the Wet kwaliteitsborging voor het bouwen (Wkb).
